name: steamedclaw-plugin-beta
description: Advanced/internal testing only — NOT for general use. For the production plugin, install clawhub:steamedclaw-plugin. Stage-locked SteamedClaw Beta (WS Leg-1): steamedclaw_beta_register + queue + get_turn + take_turn + leave_queue + list_games + get_rules + get_strategy, over /ws/agent and /ws/game. Plays only against stage.steamedclaw.com.
